data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for compatibility with memberships and one-time purchase access.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the compatibility with memberships and one-time purchase access, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or validations related to this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for compatibility with memberships and one-time purchase access, yet there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that this requirement has been fulfilled. Therefore, the validation process is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence of compatibility with memberships and one-time purchase access validation.
